cap-theorem.name: CAP Theorem
cap-theorem.essence: When the network splits, you choose consistency or availability — never both

memberPatterns.name: Quorum & Consensus
memberPatterns.role: Tune the consistency/availability dial with read/write quorums

memberPatterns.name: Replication
memberPatterns.role: The copies whose agreement CAP is about

memberPatterns.name: Leader Election
memberPatterns.role: A single writer trades availability for consistency

memberPatterns.name: Saga
memberPatterns.role: Choose availability, then reconcile with eventual consistency

streaming.name: Streaming
streaming.essence: Processing unbounded data as it arrives, not in batches

memberPatterns.name: Producer-Consumer
memberPatterns.role: The basic shape of a stream stage

memberPatterns.name: Backpressure
memberPatterns.role: Keep a fast producer from drowning a slow consumer

memberPatterns.name: Pipe-and-Filter
memberPatterns.role: Compose stages into a processing pipeline

memberPatterns.name: Publish-Subscribe
memberPatterns.role: Fan a stream out to many subscribers

memberPatterns.name: Event Sourcing
memberPatterns.role: A durable, replayable stream of events

memberPatterns.name: Competing Consumers
memberPatterns.role: Scale a stream across parallel workers

spike-handling.name: Handling Spikes
spike-handling.essence: Absorb, shed, or scale when traffic suddenly surges

memberPatterns.name: Queue-Based Load Leveling
memberPatterns.role: Absorb the burst in a queue

memberPatterns.name: Rate Limiter
memberPatterns.role: Shed load above a safe rate

memberPatterns.name: Autoscaling
memberPatterns.role: Add capacity as the surge builds

memberPatterns.name: Bulkhead
memberPatterns.role: Contain the blast radius of overload

memberPatterns.name: Circuit Breaker
memberPatterns.role: Fail fast when downstream is saturated

memberPatterns.name: CDN
memberPatterns.role: Serve the static surge from the edge

memberPatterns.name: Cache-Aside
memberPatterns.role: Take read pressure off the origin

performance.name: Performance
performance.essence: Serving more, faster: load balancing, caching, and memory

memberPatterns.name: CDN
memberPatterns.role: Cut latency by serving from the edge

memberPatterns.name: Consistent Hashing
memberPatterns.role: Route to the node that already has the data warm

memberPatterns.name: Object Pool
memberPatterns.role: Reuse expensive objects to cut allocation cost

memberPatterns.name: Flyweight
memberPatterns.role: Shrink memory by sharing immutable state

auth-and-access.name: Auth & Access
auth-and-access.essence: Who are you, what may you do, and how is that enforced

memberPatterns.name: Authorization Enforcer (RBAC)
memberPatterns.role: Decide what the role may do

memberPatterns.name: Federated Identity
memberPatterns.role: Delegate sign-on to a trusted provider

memberPatterns.name: Single Access Point
memberPatterns.role: Funnel access through one guarded entry

memberPatterns.role: Validate and screen at that entry

memberPatterns.name: Least Privilege
memberPatterns.role: Grant the minimum needed, no more

memberPatterns.name: Intercepting Validator
memberPatterns.role: Reject bad input before it reaches logic

scalability.name: Scalability
scalability.essence: Growing capacity with load without rewriting the system

memberPatterns.name: Stateless Service
memberPatterns.role: Statelessness is what lets you add instances freely

consistency-and-replication.name: Consistency & Replication
consistency-and-replication.essence: Keeping copies of data in agreement across nodes

memberPatterns.name: Replication
memberPatterns.role: The copies to keep in agreement

memberPatterns.name: Quorum & Consensus
memberPatterns.role: Agree on writes across a majority

memberPatterns.name: Outbox

memberPatterns.name: Gossip Protocol

observability.name: Observability

memberPatterns.name: Wire Tap

memberPatterns.name: Circuit Breaker
memberPatterns.role: Its state is a key health signal

resilience.name: Resilience
